The intimate live performance series disguised as a backyard kickback

Calm Down

calm shindig

AN INTIMATE LIVE PERFORMANCE SERIES 

LIVE PERFORMANCES

For performers, the Shindig offers a welcoming space to share your art. You’ll be playing for an engaged crowd in person, plus a growing digital audience. Our production team captures high-quality content from your set, so your performance doesn’t just live in the moment—it continues to connect and reach new listeners online.

Spotlight PerformerS

We showcase quality, no matter where you are in your journey. 

All that matters is the music and your undoubted potential.

Our spotlight artist closes out each event with a 30-minute set, bringing something unique to each Shindig.

Supporting sounds

Live Bands & DJs while you're conversing, eating, and drinking.

Supplying the soundtrack to new friendships. 

Whether it’s Soul, Jazz, Hip-Hop, House, or RnB,

the music adds to the elevated backyard atmosphere we’ve built.
